title: NPower

images.alt:
“I was going through the motions and pretty uninspired at the time.” So many students like Isabella Gravina come to @NPower looking for a new start. She was working at the front desk in a medical facility but felt the job was going nowhere. She talked to a friend who launched a tech career through @NPower and she signed up right away.  Your donation to NPower is so much more than a gift.  You're helping students like Isabella find a rewarding career and bright future in tech.  Donate today and help inspire more students like Isabella find a new future in tech.  Link to donate: www.npower.org/donate
 #NPower #TechCareers #NewChapters #NotJustAGift #GivingBack #Donations

Where is Porfirio now?  He’s fielding two job offers and is ready to launch his tech career before the end of the year!  That’s what your donation to @NPower does.  It helps students like Porfirio get the free training, job placement, and social support needed to get started in tech.  The momentum created is truly transforming lives.  Share his story to inspire others and take a moment to donate to NPower today. 

#NPower #techcareers #freshstart #donation #notjustagift

“When one door closes, another one opens.” Today, we kick off our season of giving by introducing you to Porfirio Lopez. When considering a future beyond the Army, Porfirio thought he would enter law enforcement. But things didn't go to plan, and he was facing a future without any prospects. Until a friend told him about @NPower. Your donation to NPower is a gift of opportunity, a second chance, and an open door. Donate today and help students like Porfirio open the door to new possibilities and careers in tech.  www.npower.org/donate.  #NPower #TechCareers #NewChapters #NotJustAGift #GivingBack #donations

Today is #GivingTuesday and your chance to give to NPower.
Your support today allows us to continue to provide free tech training, job placement, and social support services to veterans and young adults from underserved communities.
Give what you can today by sharing, donating, or engaging with NPower.
Every dollar, every volunteer hour, every mention helps us to continue to create pathways to prosperity for our graduates and their families.
Take a moment and give back to NPower today. Thank you!
Click here to donate now: https://www.npower.org/donate/

#careersintech #techcareers  #techjobs #jobsintech #jobtraining #cyberjobs #cybersecuritytraining #DonateAwareness
#technology #careers #software #tech #training #cloudsecurity #cybersecurity #contest #donate #givingback #giveback #givingtuesday2022

Tomorrow is #GivingTuesday, a day of giving back and making a difference. And you can absolutely make a difference for a young adult, military veteran, and their family looking to change the trajectory of their life through tech.

NPower provides training and job placement at no-cost to our trainees, and it’s all made possible by the generous donations we receive from individuals, alumni, and our corporate partners.

Click here to give what you can: https://www.npower.org/donate/ 

We thank you all for your support and generosity as we continue to serve our communities and bridge the digital divide in tech!

#givingtuesday #technology #careers #software #tech #training #cloudsecurity #cybersecurity #giveback #donate #givingback #donations #nonprofit #technonprofit
#npower #careersintech #techcareers #techjobs #jobsintech #jobtraining #cyberjobs #cybersecuritytraining

NPower's partnership with @nbafoundation is opening doors and creating pathways to prosperity for Black young adults. The grant awarded to @NPower is focused on enrolling, training, and increasing the number of Black young adults in technology careers, with emphasis on the NPower regions of Maryland, Michigan, New York, New Jersey and Southern California. We are so thankful to the NBA Foundation and its continued support of our mission! #STEM #technology #NPower #techcareers #jobtraining #techjobs

Attention #NPowerAlumni! Our referral contest is back and winners can receive up to $2200 for anyone that they refer to #NPower.

To enter the contest, simply go to https://pulse.ly/jxw700tzlx and your name will be added to our list.

1st round winners will be announced Monday, December 12th!

Thank you so much for all of your referrals!

#careersintech #techcareers  #techjobs #jobsintech #jobtraining #cyberjobs #cybersecuritytraining #technology #careers #software #tech #training #cloudsecurity #cybersecurity

We are so thankful to @mackenziescott2020 who awarded NPower with a $15 Million dollar grant in March, our largest individual donation to date.  Over the next three years, this grant allows NPower to launch innovative pilot programs, including SkillBridge in Virginia, and provide additional student support through emergency funds and alumni services. Thank you, Ms. Scott, for believing in the NPower mission! #STEM #womenintech #technology #NPower #techcareers #jobtraining #techjobs

*EVENT ALERT*

Where can you hear from Serena Williams, NPower's CEO, Bertina Ceccarelli, experts and advocates in STEM, newsmakers, inspirational thinkers, and leaders in technology and business? 

At MetLife’s Triangle Tech X Conference which is back for the fourth year in a row and will be bigger than ever! 

This free two-day event will convene powerful voices sharing insights and valuable guidance to inspire the next innovation wave in STEM with a focus on the critical roles of women in the field and their impact on solving health, social, economic issues and more. 

We look forward to hearing perspectives on what's needed to inspire the next generation of women to pursue – and thrive – in STEM from Bertina Ceccarelli, Pawan Verma, EVP, Global Chief Information Officer, MetLife, Tarika Barrett, Ph.D., CEO, Girls Who Code, and Forest T Harper Jr, CEO, INROADS during the virtual conversation 'Inspiring the Next Generation of Women in STEM' on December 1 at 11am ET.

You don't want to be anywhere else! 

To learn more, get inspired, leave empowered register at:
bit.ly/3fdL8P0

#TTX2022 #STEM #womenintech #technology

NPower Texas Executive Director, Jonathan Pride, attended an event at the @whitehouse today and represented @npowerorg in marking the end of the Cybersecurity Apprenticeship Sprint. The event was part of National Apprenticeship Week and the celebration of the 85th Anniversary of the National Apprenticeship Act. There were remarks from senior White House and agency officials on the importance of Registered Apprenticeship in building a skilled and diverse cybersecurity workforce and the accomplishments of the Sprint. A moderated panel discussion highlighted the progress and advantages of building cybersecurity talent using Registered Apprenticeship programs. The event concluded with a signing ceremony, all to demonstrate the overwhelming potential and success in promoting Registered Apprenticeships. We were honored to take part in this incredible initiative! 
 
#apprenticeships #whitehouse #Cybersecurity #apprenticeshipsprint

Donate
DONATE TODAY ›
A THRIVING
CAREER IN TECH


NPower is on a mission to move people from poverty to the middle class through tech skills training and quality job placement.
Apply
Skill up and get ready for in-demand tech jobs that forecasted to grow in 2022. Applications for virtual class are open.
Get Started
Hire
NPower graduates are trained, vetted and ready to fill your technology job opening and diversify your team.
See for Yourself
Engage
Learn how you can mentor, volunteer and support NPower students and alumni.
Get Involved
Our Locations
Our program sites across the country are beacons of excellence in free IT training leading to industry-recognized credentials, career support and building employment pipelines

Anthony Shaw
IT Project Manager, Citi
